assertions: two independent replicas converge on one canonical root and acknowledge independently
invalid, conflicting, backward, and gapped roots retain the last valid snapshot
resource identifiers reject traversal components and canonical resource paths cannot escape through symlinks
an acknowledgement failure after publication is retried before processing another root
credential rotation replaces affected provider clients while provider-account capacity remains stable
pricing-only publication retains provider, account, circuit, semaphore, ledger, and principal capacity state
agents resolve direct, policy-default, and bound internal legacy aliases without accepting provider topology
internal legacy aliases are agent-bound and are never enumerated through the public models endpoint
limits: the evidence is bound to an uncommitted worktree rather than a source commit
live provider endpoint compatibility remains an enablement gate and is not claimed by this evidence
